security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: asset: https://login.microsoftonline.com https://login.microsoft.com https://graph.microsoft.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://login.microsoftonline.com https://login.microsoft.com https://graph.microsoft.com https://*.crm4.dynamics.com

bundle.shortDescription: A streamlined CRM for Ingram Micro colleagues.
bundle.longDescription: Ingram Micro CRM is a lightweight desktop application built for Ingram Micro account managers. It replaces the cluttered Dynamics 365 interface with a focused tool for managing customers, contacts, activities, follow-ups, and opportunities — all synced with D365 in the background.
